title: Claytonia vestiana
taxonomy: Claytonia vestiana is a species of plant in the family Montiaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the miner's lettuce family. This family is part of the order Caryophyllales, a diverse group of flowering plants that includes the carnation family and the pinks. Claytonia vestiana belongs to the genus Claytonia, which consists of various species of plants commonly known as winter purslane or spring beauty. Within the genus Claytonia, Claytonia vestiana is a unique species native to Australia. Further classification of Claytonia vestiana may be possible with more specific information.
